productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Stripes Navy Blue Polo Tshirt
description: Composition Navy blue and yellow striped T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a polo neck with navy blue collar and yellow tipping, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, concealed buttoned chest placket, embroidered and appliqued branding on the left chest, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with similar colours Tumble dry low Medium iron do not iron on decorations Polo is the king of Sports and this striped T-shirt from US Polo equalises that enthusiasim. Perfect for the young at heart, this tee bears a special resemblance for those associated with the oldest team sport in the world. Team this with jeans or layer it under a cardigan for instant throw-on-and-go style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6', shoulders 18"
